global: Gifting: cosmetics can now be gifted to friends in-game
Ranked placement matches now count toward seasonal rewards (bugfix)
items: Scattershot: Physical power 30% -> 40%, +50% bonus minion damage, but no longer benefits from lifesteal
Absolution: Cost 3150 -> 3100; attack speed 25% -> 35%; physical power 40 -> 30; magical armor 35 -> 40
Earthshaker: Physical power 40 -> 45, health 250 -> 300, haste 10 -> 15, Battleborn 1% -> 1.25%; 20% attack speed removed
Mutilator: Fixed Mutilate damage bug and cleave interaction
Dreambinder: Magical power 80 -> 70; Chilling Spells slow 25% -> 30%; DoT slow 15% -> 20%
Orb Of Growth: Art Of Fortitude healing 3% over 3s -> 3% over 5s
Orb Of Enlightenment: Health per level 15 -> 12; Art Of Fortitude 3% over 3s -> 3% over 5s
Crescelia: Cost 2450 -> 2300; haste 20 -> 15; Moonblade loses 12% CDR, gains +12 gold on hero hit
Dawnstar: Crusader applies a damage-reduction stack when an enemy is immobilized
Dynamo: Physical armor 25 -> 30; Immobilizer damage amp 10% -> 8%
Frosted Lure: Health 300 -> 325; armor 35 -> 40; Frostwaver damage 50 -> 80, range 550 -> 650

eternals.summary: A sweep against sustain and free value: every healing minor trimmed (Krix, Idrisil, Xyris, Exarch), Lotus and Demiurge utility taxed, Marrow omnivamp down. Vermis and Thraex are the only clean winners.

changes.name: Krix
changes.change: Regenerative Tissue top ranks 0.8%/1.2% -> 0.7%/1%; Voracity max-health healing 1% -> 0.75% (kill gold 2 -> 3)

changes.name: Lotus
changes.change: Immaculate damage reduction 20% -> 15%; Prima Donna damage taken 5% -> 6%

changes.name: Demiurge
changes.change: Construct ability haste 1.25 -> 1; Bloatware damage reduction 1% -> 0.75%

changes: Stealth Matrix cooldown modifier +20% -> +10% (a buff — less cooldown penalty)

analysis.summary: Mixed: his anti-tank Peekaboo damage was trimmed, but his stealth engage is up more often and faster (lower cooldowns, more movement speed).
analysis.playing: You roam and re-engage more often; your max-health burst is a touch lower, so commit when the pick is clean.
analysis.facing: Expect more frequent stealth engages with a bigger speed burst, but slightly less burst on arrival — ward and track his cooldowns.

analysis.summary: Kira's Mercy ability was nerfed, notably lower damage.
analysis.playing: Your poke and finishing damage from Mercy is down; rely more on positioning and basics.
analysis.facing: Her burst is lower — you can play a bit more forward against her poke.

changes: War Anthem reworked: auras heal 50% less, both grant physical power (March up to 50)
Song Of My People regen scales magical power; move speed band flattened
Crash Bang Boom knock-up damage 50/75/100 -> 80/150/220 + 100% bonus-physical scaling
Maco Fly shield scaling 5.5% -> 4%, magical power 40% -> 50%, dash slower
Crushing Maw damage +5, adds 4% bonus-health scaling (power scalings trimmed)
Consume bite damage +5, bite heal 2/2.5/3% -> 2.5/3.5/4.5% max health
Tesseract attack speed per canister -1% all tiers; non-hero healing 25% -> 20%
Primeval Roar damage reduction top rank 36% -> 30%
Make Way damage up (280 -> 310 top), cooldown +1s, scaling 100% -> 90%
Stone Forged Soul damage 240/370/500 -> 250/400/550; min heal 10-14% -> 14-18%; max heal 30-40% -> 35-45%; fixed 2.5x heal multiplier and Tainted interaction
Double Pain scaling up to 165% top rank, cooldowns +0.5s
Ancestral Fury added 0.3% Magical Power/stack, rage 3->4 per attack

analysis.summary: Big buff: Cull comes back dramatically faster and his kit now scales with Magical Power too, opening strong bruiser/AP jungle builds with far more ult uptime.
analysis.playing: You can fight and re-fight much more often thanks to the shorter Cull cooldown; experiment with Magical Power for extra sustain and damage.
analysis.facing: He'll have his execute ult up almost every skirmish now — avoid repeated low-health duels and bring anti-heal.

analysis.summary: Bugfix: a Contagion cleanse exploit was closed — no intended balance change.
analysis.playing: Play as normal; the cleanse interaction just works correctly now.
analysis.facing: Unchanged matchup outside the patched exploit.

changes: Tiny Titan attack speed down; Rock & Awe max range 6000 -> 4000
Added Bonus Physical scaling to Zap O'9-Chains (30%) and Shock Therapy (70%)

analysis.summary: Riktor was nerfed on durability and shield, with bonus Physical Power scaling added — a hit to tank Riktor that nudges toward a damage build.
analysis.playing: You're less tanky; the added Physical scaling rewards a more damage-oriented bruiser build to keep your threat up.
analysis.facing: Tank Riktor is squishier now — punish his hooks and burst him through the smaller shield.

changes: Gravebreaker: Colossal Blow now damages towers (25% max-health true damage)
Heavy Metal total armor scaling decreased
Health regen 2.1 -> 1.8 (growth down); physical armor growth 5.2 -> 4.8; mana 330 -> 350
Ruthless Assault armor steal 37.5% -> 35%, mana flat 50
Severance damage down (-25 top rank) but scaling 105% -> 115%
Soul Weaver ult CDR 8% -> 10%; Ephemeral Surge move speed 35% -> 25%, duration shorter

analysis.summary: Drongo's poke and ult hit harder and his ability is up more often — a clean carry buff.
analysis.playing: Lean into Old Rusty poke (the longer slow sets up follow-up) and trust your ult to do more late.
analysis.facing: His zoning is stronger; dodge the puddle or you'll eat a longer slow into more damage.

changes: Combat Thrusters move speed down; Blast Off CDR 12% -> 15%
Slayer Of The Heavens minion-aggro bugfix
Health regen 1.8 -> 1.55; physical power growth 1.49 -> 1.65; armor 27 -> 29

analysis.summary: Bugfix: Allegro's cooldown refund now behaves correctly — no intended balance change.
analysis.playing: Play as normal; your cooldown refunds are just consistent now.

analysis.summary: Small buff: TwinBlast's Vaporize and Vortex Grenade scale a bit better with Physical Power.
analysis.playing: A touch more ability damage in your combo — keep playing the mobile crit/AD carry.
analysis.facing: Marginally more burst from his abilities; otherwise the same matchup.

changes: Spear of Nyr damage 70-190->70-210, scaling 115%->125%, +25% monster damage reduction, added 80% Magical

analysis.summary: Big all-around buff: more Physical Power per level, a faster/longer Evade, a much stronger Spear of Nyr (now with monster damage reduction and Magical scaling), and a bigger ult.
analysis.playing: He's stronger in lane and jungle — your spear pokes harder, you survive camps better, the ult does more, and Magical Power is now an option.
analysis.facing: Expect harder spear poke and a bigger ult; don't trade into his Evade and respect his improved survivability.

changes: Flame Turret scaling 28% -> 30%, turret health up
Oil Spill 50-210 -> 70-210 flat, scaling 45% -> 50%, slow scales by rank to 50%
Fixed Overseer not amplifying Cryoseism damage
Zero Shift ranged-stance physical power -2 all ranks
Focal Lens armor shred 20% -> 25% + stacking bugfix
Hellfire Rounds speed/attack scaling 15% -> 18% (monster cap lowered to 200-450)

analysis.summary: Strong damage buff: Obliterate and Scar scale much harder and his on-hit ramp is faster, at the cost of a lower monster-damage cap.
analysis.playing: Build damage — your ult and Scar hit far harder now; clear is marginally slower but your hero damage jumps.
analysis.facing: His burst and ult threat are up significantly; don't sit in Obliterate range at low health.

analysis.summary: Serath was nerfed: shorter stun, weaker empowered-mode damage, and lower Heresy burn.
analysis.playing: Your lockdown and burst are down — land Crushing Descent cleanly and don't over-rely on Fury damage.
analysis.facing: Her crowd control and burst are weaker — you have more room to fight back after her engage.

changes: Fixed Inner Fire stealth removal when Heightened Senses activated
Bramble Patch magical-power scaling 75% -> 70%, mana cost 70-110 -> 60-100

analysis.summary: Mixed tune: a healthier mana pool and cheaper Bramble Patch, offset by slightly lower Bramble scaling and a hair less move speed.
analysis.playing: You can poke more sustainably with cheaper Bramble; the damage per cast is marginally lower.
analysis.facing: She zones more often but each Bramble hits a touch less — contest the space a bit more freely.

changes: Rising Storm: fixed a stack bug with Eternals

analysis.summary: Nerf: Windburn scales less and is up less often, plus a Rising Storm/Eternals stacking bug was fixed.
analysis.playing: Your Windburn poke is weaker and on a longer cooldown — rely more on positioning and basics.
analysis.facing: His ability poke is down and less frequent; step up between Windburns.

changes: Physical power 59 -> 58; regen, both armors down

analysis.summary: Mixed: her movement steroid is on a longer cooldown and her ult's damage reduction was cut, with an odd physical-power growth bump that only matters for off-meta builds.
analysis.playing: You shield-engage a bit less often and your ult mitigates less — time Alacrity and Reversal more deliberately.
analysis.facing: Her peel ult is slightly weaker and up less; commit to a dive when Alacrity is down.

analysis.summary: Broad nerf: less health scaling and lower physical-power scaling across Force Push, Windsurge, and his clone ult.
analysis.playing: Your combo and ult clone hit less — itemize for the lost damage and pick engages carefully.
analysis.facing: His burst and clone pressure are weaker; you can trade into him a bit more confidently.

changes: Assault Mode physical power 12.5% -> 10%, magical power 9% -> 8%
Herald bubble healing 3 -> 4-12 by rank; anomaly window 5s -> 4s, burn 0.6% -> 0.75%
Hydroclasm slow 12% -> 15%, charged bubble +10, scaling 65% -> 70%; NEW: Brine-popped bubbles penetrate 40% magical armor
Brine scaling 55% -> 50%, kill gold down, range 1900 -> 1750, cooldown floor 3 -> 4
Plasma Barrage adds 6% missing-health physical damage
